categories.title: Dehydrated Onion

categories.title: Star Anise

categories.title: Dehydrated Fruit Powders

Note: HS codes are indicative 8-digit ITC-HS references at category/sub-category level (or per item where chemistry differs within a group, e.g. Inorganic Pigments). Please confirm exact classification with your customs broker before filing shipping documents.
